specs.title: cp-000: BibTeX keys are derived from the first segment of the first author name then yea
cp-001: RIS export writes AN - PMIDpmid when a PubMed ID exists
cp-002: SaveToLibraryButton initializes state idle and errorMessage
cp-003: SaveToLibraryButton defaults isLoggedIn true the page never passes a different v
cp-004: Save-to-library clicks are ignored when isComplete or isLoggedIn
cp-005: Save-to-library posts POST apideep-researchsave with topic mode markdownReport s
cp-006: Save-to-library success sets state saved and leaves the button disabled thereaft
cp-007: Save-to-library failure sets state error and sets errorMessage to errmessage or
cp-008: The error-state save button label is exactly Retry
cp-009: The saved-state save button label is exactly Saved
cp-010: The save button tooltip text is one of Sign in to save Research must be complete
cp-011: Save-to-library error tooltips do not auto-clear clicking the button again retri
cp-012: PastResearchSessions fetches GET apideep-researchsessions on mount inside a useE
cp-013: The past-research loading message is exactly Loading past research
cp-014: A non-401 past-research fetch failure stores the exact error string Could not lo
cp-015: A 401 past-research response does not set an error and simply hides the section
cp-016: The visible section title is exactly Past Research
cp-017: Each past-session row shows Capitalized mode papersFound papers relativeDate
cp-018: Relative dates are exactly just now mm ago hh ago dd ago or an en-US short month
cp-019: The page tree has no session-delete control and no session-delete API call
